purpose: Round-304 cross-locale fixture for digital.vasic.challenges bank loader + assertion engine. Mandated by CONST-046 (no hardcoded user-facing strings) and round-304 parity with rounds 220 / 295 / 298 / 300. Every locale exercises the JSON → bank.Load → registry.Register → runner.Run → report pipeline through the assertion engine with non-ASCII bytes preserved end-to-end.

payloads.description: Verify all services are healthy and reachable.
Stelle sicher, dass alle Dienste gesund und erreichbar sind. (Umlaute: ä ö ü ß)
Verifica que todos los servicios estén sanos y accesibles. (Diacríticos: á é í ó ú ñ)
payloads.assertion_target: la respuesta del servicio no está vacía

payloads.description: すべてのサービスが正常で到達可能であることを確認します。漢字とひらがなとカタカナの混在。
payloads.assertion_target: サービス応答が空でないこと

payloads.description: Провери да ли су сви сервиси здрави и доступни. (Ћирилица + латиница)
